description: Public GitHub go/no-go decision pack for GrantLayer developer-preview release. Documents the final decision gate before GL-161 (Clean Public Snapshot Build). No GitHub publication, no GitHub API, no remote changes, no history rewrite.
prerequisites_reviewed: GL-153 LICENSE / CONTRIBUTING / SECURITY Decision Pack
GL-154 AGENTS.md + llms.txt + Agent Integration Manifest
GL-156 GitHub Issue Templates / Feedback Templates
GL-157 Public Secret / Sensitive Data Scan Gate
GL-158 Git History Exposure Review / Public Snapshot Decision
GL-159 GitHub Private Mirror Dry Run
go_criteria: README.md present with Developer Preview and not-production-SaaS caveats
SECURITY.md present with vulnerability disclosure policy
GL-157 scan gate script present and validated
Full backend suite passing on main (or documented deferral)
no_go_blockers: Real customer data in tracked files
Private personal data in tracked files
Internal absolute paths in snapshot content
Overclaim: full internal git history verified clean
Overclaim: public GitHub release occurred before publication
Full internal git history publication (.git/ directory or raw git bundle)
manual_approval_inputs: Final remote target (public GitHub repository URL)
Final repo description with Developer Preview caveat
GL-157 scan gate result: Pass (exit code 0)
Full backend suite result: Pass (or documented deferral)
Security caveats verified: Developer Preview, not production SaaS, no real data
gl161_requirements: Build clean public snapshot from main using git archive or git ls-files
Validate full file allowlist against GL-159 candidate contents
Verify all explicit exclusions (.git/, .claude/, private hostnames, internal paths)
Run GL-157 scan gate against snapshot tree (must exit 0)
Run targeted public-readiness tests against snapshot
Produce snapshot tree hash for manual approval
Do not push to any remote in GL-161
gl162_requirements: Configure public repository metadata (name, description, topics, default branch, license)
Await explicit manual approval using the required approval phrase
Publish clean snapshot to GitHub only after manual approval
Verify repository after publication (visibility, file set, no forbidden content)
Confirm no GitHub publication occurs without manual approval
Confirm no internal remote references in published content
